locators.label: Exact order code, polarity, absolute limits, body dimensions, and recommended land pattern
Electrical and optical characteristics at 20 mA
Current active family status and exact order-code listing

pins.name: A
pins.function: Anode, marked positive in the package schematic.

pins.name: K
pins.function: Cathode, marked negative and identified by the package polarity mark.

ratings.name: continuous forward current
ratings.qualifier: At 25 °C ambient; thermal design and derating remain required.

ratings.name: luminous intensity
ratings.qualifier: At 20 mA; optical distribution and production variation apply.

land_pattern.locator: page 1, recommended land pattern; 0.80 x 0.80 mm pads and 0.80 mm gap independently recomputed to ±0.80 mm pad centers
land_pattern.coordinate_convention: Component centroid is (0,0); +x is right and +y is down in the top view; pin 1 anode is left and pin 2 cathode/polarity-mark side is right.

symbol.tool_version: Component Intelligence native CAD generator 2.0 / KiCad 10 syntax
symbol.provenance: Original Lyon Industries conventional LED symbol serialized from the reviewed exact-MPN pin map.
limitations: The schematic symbol does not encode current, voltage, optical bin, or thermal limits; read the record before use.

footprint.tool_version: Component Intelligence native CAD generator 2.0 / KiCad 10 syntax
footprint.provenance: Original Lyon Industries footprint serialized from the manufacturer-recommended land pattern and polarity drawing.
limitations: Stencil, solder volume, optical shadowing, and process-specific land adjustments remain the responsibility of the consuming PCB design.

step_model.provenance: Original Lyon Industries nominal chip-envelope model generated from manufacturer dimensions.
limitations: Nominal seating and clearance envelope only; lens optics, emission, polarity mark appearance, tolerances, and internal construction are omitted.

packing.method: 8 mm embossed tape on 178 mm reel

orientation.description: Pin 1 is the anode; pin 2 is the cathode and package polarity-mark side. Tape feeding direction and polarity mark are shown in the packaging drawing.
orientation.locator: pages 1 and 5, package and tape polarity drawings

notes: Use a current-limiting element and verify optical output and thermal limits at the actual duty cycle and ambient.

findings.summary: The LED requires external current limiting; the 30 mA continuous value is an absolute maximum, not a recommended design current, and forward voltage spans 1.8 V to 2.6 V at 20 mA.

checks.name: official source identity
checks.method: Captured and hashed the official exact-order-code data sheet and recorded page locators.

checks.name: independent product and package cross-check
checks.method: Compared exact identity, package, color, optical values, and current active family status against the official product catalog.

checks.name: explicit land-pattern and polarity arithmetic
checks.method: Recomputed pad centers from manufacturer pad length and gap, then cross-checked pin-one anode and cathode polarity against the package and tape drawings.

checks.name: native CAD replay and geometry gate
checks.method: Replayed the KiCad 10 symbol and footprint from the record, parsed pin and pad semantics, checked silk and courtyard rules, reopened STEP, and measured seating and envelope.

rights.normalized_record_origin: Original Lyon Industries normalization based on linked official manufacturer sources.
